Off Calendar Nov-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Continued To Nov-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-05-2019 Continued To Jun-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Senick for and with Leo Gallant (Petitioner).

Mr. Senick stated that he is satisfied that they have done all they could with respect to searching for heirs without considerable extra expense or without knowledge that they would find anymore names. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for August 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Continued To Feb-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Feb-06-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Senick for and with Leo Gallant (Petitioner).

Mr. Senick stated that they still technically have no heir, that there are fourteen Aunts and Uncles all of who are deceased except for one, that there could be many Cousins out there, that most of them are deceased and that they are here for the Court to decide how much further they need to go. The Court is setting a cap on the heir finder's fee at $3,200.00. Mr. Senick stated that the heir finders have made progress and that he thinks it will them about a month to do a further search. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to February 6, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Senick will file a report and send notice to any names they have discovered.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Senick for and with Leo Gallant (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it requires more information about the efforts made to locate heirs. Mr. Senick stated that they never had any knowledge of any family, that the Decedent said he did not have any family, that they found the property where the Decedent lived with his Mother, and that they looked into the address and attempted to locate the person who lived in the property. Mr. Senick also stated that they were unable to get a hold of that person, that they used Spokio (online search engine), that they found the obituary of the Decedent's Father, but no information, that they do not know if the Decedent had any siblings, and that they have not talked with an heir search firm, but they can hire one. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to December 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2018 Continued To Nov-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
